symbols.name: EntityFrameworkReadOnlyGenericRepository
symbols.summary: Provides a read-only repository implementation for Entity Framework that supports asynchronous operations for querying entities from the database.

syntax.content: public class EntityFrameworkReadOnlyGenericRepository : IGenericReadOnlyRepository, IRepository where TEntity : class, IEntity

symbols.name: EntityFrameworkReadOnlyGenericRepository(EntityFrameworkRepositoryOptions)
symbols.summary: Represents a read-only generic repository using Entity Framework.

syntax.content: protected EntityFrameworkReadOnlyGenericRepository(EntityFrameworkRepositoryOptions options)

symbols.summary: Provides a read-only generic repository implementation using Entity Framework.

syntax.content: protected EntityFrameworkReadOnlyGenericRepository(Builder optionsBuilder)

symbols.name: EntityFrameworkReadOnlyGenericRepository(ILoggerFactory, DbContext)
symbols.summary: A read-only generic repository implementation using Entity Framework.

syntax.content: public EntityFrameworkReadOnlyGenericRepository(ILoggerFactory loggerFactory, DbContext context)

symbols.name: FindAllAsync(IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Retrieves all entities asynchronously from the repository that match the specified options.

syntax.content: public virtual Task> FindAllAsync(IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: An optional parameter to specify filtering, sorting, and pagination options for the query.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains a collection of entities matching the specified options.

parameters.description: An optional parameter to specify filtering, sorting, and pagination options for the query.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains a collection of entities matching the specified options.

symbols.name: FindAllAsync(ISpecification, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Asynchronously retrieves all entities that match the specified criteria.

syntax.content: public virtual Task> FindAllAsync(ISpecification specification, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The specification defining the criteria entities must meet to be retrieved.
An optional set of options to customize the retrieval operation.
A cancellation token that can be used to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an enumerable of entities matching the criteria.

parameters.description: The specification defining the criteria entities must meet to be retrieved.
An optional set of options to customize the retrieval operation.
A cancellation token that can be used to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an enumerable of entities matching the criteria.

symbols.name: FindAllAsync(IEnumerable>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Finds all entities that match the given specifications.

syntax.content: public virtual Task> FindAllAsync(IEnumerable> specifications, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The collection of specifications to filter the entities.
Optional find options to apply additional query customization.
A cancellation token to observe while waiting for the task to complete.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains a collection of entities that match the given specifications.

parameters.description: The collection of specifications to filter the entities.
Optional find options to apply additional query customization.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains a collection of entities that match the given specifications.

symbols.name: ProjectAllAsync(Expression>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Projects all entities of type TEntity using the specified projection expression.

syntax.content: public virtual Task> ProjectAllAsync(Expression> projection, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The expression used to project each entity.
Optional find options for the query.
A cancellation token that can be used to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an enumerable of the projected results.

parameters.description: The expression used to project each entity.
Optional find options for the query.
A cancellation token that can be used to cancel the operation.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an enumerable of the projected results.

symbols.name: ProjectAllAsync(ISpecification, Expression>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Projects all entities of type TEntity that satisfy the provided specification to a collection of type TProjection.

syntax.content: public virtual Task> ProjectAllAsync(ISpecification specification, Expression> projection, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: ProjectAllAsync(IEnumerable>, Expression>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Asynchronously projects all entities to the specified projection type, based on the provided specifications.

syntax.content: public virtual Task> ProjectAllAsync(IEnumerable> specifications, Expression> projection, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The collection of specifications used to filter the entities.
The expression defining the projection from the entity to the projection type.
Optional find options to apply to the query, such as ordering, skipping, and taking.
An optional cancellation token to cancel the asynchronous operation.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation, containing the projected results as a collection of TProjection.

parameters.description: The collection of specifications used to filter the entities.
The expression defining the projection from the entity to the projection type.
Optional find options to apply to the query, such as ordering, skipping, and taking.
An optional cancellation token to cancel the asynchronous operation.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation, containing the projected results as a collection of TProjection.

symbols.name: FindOneAsync(object, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Asynchronously finds an entity by its ID.

syntax.content: public virtual Task FindOneAsync(object id, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The ID of the entity to find.
Optional find options to customize the query.
A cancellation token to observe while waiting for the task to complete.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the entity if found, otherwise null.

symbols.name: FindOneAsync(IEnumerable>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Asynchronously retrieves a single entity of type TEntity based on the specified specifications and find options.

syntax.content: public virtual Task FindOneAsync(IEnumerable> specifications, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: A collection of criteria used to filter the entities.
Optional find options to modify query behavior, such as sorting. If null, default options are used.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains a single entity of type TEntity if found; otherwise, null.

symbols.name: Logger
symbols.summary: Provides logging capabilities for the repository operations.
symbols.remarks: Utilizes the Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger interface to log informational, warning, and error messages. The logger is typically configured during the initialization of the repository.

syntax.content: protected ILogger> Logger { get; }
